ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has explicit content */,
  "features" TEXT /* Featuring artists on the song, if any */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the song */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES record_labels ("record_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the artist is based */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "record_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label that released the album */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_record_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_label_id") REFERENCES record_labels ("record_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist image */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the playlist */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist containing the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song included in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in listening history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was listened to */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was listened to */,
  "listened_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song listened to */,
  "listening_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for listening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite song entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the song as favorite */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song marked as favorite */,
  "favorited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the genre image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that features another artist */,
  "featured_artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the featured artist */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborating artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_featured_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("featured_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_labels" (
  "record_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record label */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_followers" (
  "playlist_follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist follower */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that is being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following the playlist */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "user_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the settings */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preferred by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
